nasb.text: Now he sent Judah before him to Joseph, to point out the way before him to Goshen; and they came into the land of Goshen.

esv.text: He had sent Judah ahead of him to Joseph to show the way before him in Goshen, and they came into the land of Goshen.

cnv.text: 雅各派猶大先到約瑟那裡去，請約瑟指教他去歌珊的路。於是他們來到歌珊地。

ccb.text: 雅各派犹大先去见约瑟，请他派人引路到歌珊去。他们来到歌珊，

csbs.text: 雅各打发犹大先到约瑟那里，请约瑟指示前往歌珊的路。他们就这样来到了歌珊地。
